# backend/content_ops/services.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-10T10:01:15Z

## Purpose
Services for content postings + master contacts + schedules.

Per §38.3 (every operation logged) · §82.7 (quality + drift) · §57.7 (LinkedIn
adapter is rule-based stub when no API key · honest fallback).

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import logging
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import uuid
- from `collections` import Counter
- from `datetime` import datetime, time, timezone, timedelta
- from `typing` import Any, Optional
- from `_` import psycopg2
- from `_` import psycopg2.extras

- `_adapt_for_platform(posting, platform)`: Render the posting for a specific platform · honest stub for LinkedIn.
- `publish_posting(posting_id, req, tenant_id, correlation_id)`: (no docstring)
- `_quality_score_for(posting, runs)`: Quality 0..1 · simple proxy: title length + body length + platform success.

- `create_contact(data, tenant_id)`: (no docstring)
